name: Replace MkDocs with Astro + shadcn (B/W) docs site
owner: OpenCoder (delegated to CoderAgent for content batches)
exit_criteria: All old docs (mkdocs.yml, docs/*.md, deploy-docs.yml, site/) deleted
docs-site/ builds cleanly with bun run build
shadcn grayscale B/W + indigo theme is in effect on all pages
Sidebar + top nav renders with grouped nav across all routes
At least 15 MDX pages written, all using the real codebase state
Cmd+K search modal works (Pagefind index generated at build)
README.md updated to link to the new docs site
AGENTS.md documents the new docs build/dev commands
Each edit committed atomically with a focused message
bun x astro check passes with 0 errors
bun run build in docs-site passes with 0 errors and 0 warnings

subtasks.title: Tear down old MkDocs pipeline
deliverables: All old markdown and mkdocs config deleted
Deploy workflow deleted (will be replaced in subtask 15)
README.md docs section pruned
.gitignore updated to ignore new docs-site/ artifacts
subtasks.commit_message: chore(docs): remove mkdocs pipeline and old markdown

subtasks.title: Bootstrap Astro project skeleton in docs-site/
deliverables: Astro v5 + @astrojs/mdx + @astrojs/sitemap + Tailwind v4 installed via bun
Strict TypeScript, base path /advanced-homeassistant-mcp
shadcn-style CSS variable tokens in global.css (grayscale + indigo accent)
cn() utility (lib/utils.ts) for class composition
Empty pages/index.astro placeholder
subtasks.commit_message: feat(docs): bootstrap Astro + MDX + Tailwind v4 + shadcn theme tokens

subtasks.title: Install shadcn/ui components
deliverables: Components installed: button, card, tabs, accordion, badge, separator, tooltip, kbd
For interactive: dropdown-menu, sheet, command (these will be React islands in .tsx)
Each component file reviewed to confirm Astro compatibility
Import aliases resolve to @/components/ui/*
subtasks.commit_message: feat(docs): add shadcn UI components (Button, Card, Tabs, etc.)

subtasks.title: Build layout shell (BaseLayout, Sidebar, TopNav, ModeToggle)
deliverables: BaseLayout.astro sets <html>/<head>/<body>, loads global.css, mounts Sidebar+TopNav
Inline script reads localStorage.theme and applies .dark before paint (no FOUC)
Sidebar.astro renders grouped nav from src/nav.ts
TopNav.astro has current-section label + search button + theme toggle + GitHub link
ModeToggle.astro is a single button with sun/moon icon, inline script toggles .dark
PageHead.astro wraps <head> with title, meta description, OG tags, favicon
subtasks.commit_message: feat(docs): add layout shell (BaseLayout, Sidebar, TopNav, ModeToggle)

subtasks.title: Add Prose and CodeBlock components for MDX content
deliverables: Prose.astro wraps MDX content with max-width, headings, lists, links, tables, callouts, blockquotes
CodeBlock.astro wraps <pre><code> with copy button (inline script, no React)
Shiki configured with multiple languages (ts, tsx, js, bash, json, yaml, docker, mdx, toml)
subtasks.commit_message: feat(docs): add Prose and CodeBlock components for MDX content

subtasks.title: Define content collection schema
deliverables: Typed schema for /src/content/docs/* with title, description, section, order, draft
subtasks.commit_message: feat(docs): add typed content collection schema for MDX docs

subtasks.title: Write Getting Started pages (4 MDX)
deliverables: index.mdx: intro, three entry points, three build outputs (dist/index.cjs, .mjs, .mjs)
installation.mdx: bun/Node prereqs, HA >=2024.x, HASS_HOST/HASS_TOKEN/JWT_SECRET >=32 chars
quick-start.mdx: clone -> install -> configure -> build -> run, in 5 steps
first-conversation.mdx: Claude Desktop / Cursor config, first list_devices call
subtasks.commit_message: feat(docs): write Getting Started pages (intro, install, quick start, first conversation)

subtasks.title: Write Architecture pages (4 MDX)
deliverables: architecture.mdx: layer diagram (Transport -> Middleware -> Tools -> HA Client), key files, request lifecycle
transports.mdx: HTTP+WS (custom MCPServer, Express, SSE), STDIO (FastMCP v3), HTTP (FastMCP v3)
tools.mdx: Tool interface (Zod-validated, BaseTool generic), registration, execute flow, Zod-to-JSON-Schema bridge
security.mdx: JWT_SECRET >=32 chars no default, TokenManager, rate limit (windowMs/max), helmet, sanitize-html, expired-token lockout
subtasks.commit_message: feat(docs): write Architecture pages (overview, transports, tools, security)

subtasks.title: Write Configuration pages (3 MDX)
deliverables: environment-variables.mdx: full table of real env vars from src/config/app.config.ts Zod schema
tool-annotations.mdx: readOnlyHint, destructiveHint, openWorldHint on ToolAnnotations
rate-limiting.mdx: RATE_LIMIT.windowMs/RATE_LIMIT.max, per-IP vs per-token, api/auth limiters
subtasks.commit_message: feat(docs): write Configuration pages (env vars, annotations, rate limiting)

subtasks.title: Write Tools Reference pages (2 MDX)
deliverables: generic-tools.mdx: Card grid for each generic tool (search-entities, control, history, dashboard, template, error-log, sse-stats, subscribe-events, addon, package, automation-config, entity-state)
homeassistant-tools.mdx: Card grid for HA-specific tools grouped by domain (light, climate, cover, media, fan, lock, scene, switch, vacuum, todo, alarm, automation, voice, etc.)
subtasks.commit_message: feat(docs): write Tools Reference pages (generic + Home Assistant)

subtasks.title: Write Deployment pages (3 MDX)
deliverables: docker.mdx: Dockerfile (slim Bun image, no Python/audio by default), compose patterns, env injection, health checks
smithery.mdx: bun run smithery:build -> dist/smithery.js, Dockerfile.smithery, playground command
standalone.mdx: node dist/index.cjs (prod), bun run start:http, bun run start:stdio
subtasks.commit_message: feat(docs): write Deployment pages (Docker, Smithery, Standalone)

subtasks.title: Write Reference + Guides pages (5 MDX)
deliverables: api-endpoints.mdx: HTTP surface from src/index.ts (GET /health, GET /api/tools Swagger, MCP JSON-RPC, /sse)
troubleshooting.mdx: JWT_SECRET too short, HASS_TOKEN wrong, port in use, CORS, debug log levels
contributing.mdx: bun install/test/lint/format, test conventions, 80%/70% coverage, commit style
faq.mdx: 10-15 Q&A based on common GitHub issues
changelog.mdx: port CHANGELOG.md into MDX, format for docs site
subtasks.commit_message: feat(docs): write Reference + Guides pages (API, troubleshooting, contributing, FAQ, changelog)

subtasks.title: Integrate Pagefind search (Cmd+K modal)
deliverables: Pagefind runs at end of astro build, index in dist/pagefind/
SearchModal.tsx is a small React island that loads the index, filters results, renders as a list using shadcn command
TopNav search button opens the modal, Cmd+K shortcut works

subtasks.title: Replace deploy workflow with Astro Pages workflow
deliverables: New workflow: bun install -> bun run build -> upload pages artifact -> deploy to GitHub Pages
Triggers on push to main with docs-site/** changes, plus manual dispatch
subtasks.commit_message: ci(docs): replace mkdocs deploy with Astro Pages workflow

subtasks.title: Update AGENTS.md with new docs build commands
deliverables: Add Documentation section: bun --cwd docs-site run dev|build|preview
Document the new deploy flow (Pages workflow on push to main)
Link to the live docs URL
subtasks.commit_message: docs(AGENTS): document new docs build commands and deploy flow

subtasks.title: Update README.md to point to new docs site
deliverables: Prune broken/missing docs links (AUTOMATED_RELEASES, etc.)
Replace entire Documentation section with one paragraph + the new site URL
subtasks.commit_message: docs(README): point to new Astro docs site

subtasks.title: Final validation (astro check + build + smoke test)
deliverables: bun x astro check: 0 errors
bun run build: succeeds, dist/ has all 19 pages
bun run preview: manual smoke test (sidebar, dark mode, Cmd+K, no 404s, no console errors)
git status clean
